description_long: This house features a combination of stone and stucco exterior walls, with a prominent gable roof covered in dark shingles. The structure is L-shaped, with one main rectangular section and a secondary, slightly curved wing attached at an angle. The main facade displays four symmetrically arranged windows and a central wooden door, while the side and rear elevations reveal additional stonework and smaller windows. A single chimney rises from the roof, and there are subtle touches of greenery climbing up the walls, suggesting some integration with the surrounding landscape. The overall design is simple yet robust, with a rustic charm reminiscent of traditional European rural homes. The house appears to be well-suited for a residential neighborhood or a semi-urban setting.
description: A rustic L-shaped house with stone and stucco walls, a dark gable roof, and symmetrical windows. The structure features a central chimney, wooden door, and touches of climbing greenery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stone wall, the gable roof, and the curved extension of the house.
description_view_1: Front view with four windows, a central wooden door, and a stucco facade accented by stone at the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the stone wall, chimney, and the full length of the curved wing.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the main section and the end of the curved extension, with visible rooflines and windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with stone trim, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
